events.title: LYLE LOVETT UP CLOSE: “SONGS & STORIES”
events.description: Lyle Lovett takes the stage at City Winery Atlanta for a special three-night engagement filled with rich storytelling and genre-spanning sound. The Texas-born singer, composer, and actor has spent decades blending country, jazz, swing, folk, gospel, and blues into performances that are both captivating and expressive. events.title: Trivia with The Robys
events.description: Trivia Night with hosts The Robys. Join them every Thursday night at Glover Park in Marietta for the most unforgettable trivia experience this side of the Chattahoochee! They aren’t your average hosts! They are a dynamic duo bringing laughs, killer playlists, and next-level energy to your weeknight.

events.description: @ Reserve Your FREE Tickets Tickets To celebrate Civic Season and America’s 250th birthday, join Atlanta History Center for a free movie night on the lawn of Margaret Mitchell House! events.title: Gloiver Park Concert Series
events.description: The Downtown Marietta Development Authority and the City of Marietta are proud to announce the 2026 Glover Park Concert Series, presented by Wellstar Health System. events.title: Movies at The Strand: Singin’ In The Rain (1952)
events.description: ABOUT THE MOVIE: Singin’ in the Rain is a dazzling Hollywood classic that blends romance, comedy, and unforgettable musical numbers into one of the most beloved films of all time. events.title: Pup Crunch Bead Bar Pop-Up
events.description: Atlantas favorite bead bar is coming to The Dane! Stop by and design a custom necklace for your pup. No two necklaces are ever the same, just like their dogs!

events.title: Tara Cannistraci
events.description: Tara is an Italian-American stand-up comedian born and raised in the Bronx, NY. She uses her New York upbringing as the foundation for her take on observational comedy. events.title: Y’all’s Line is it Anyway?
events.description: Think you’re funnier than the cast? Prove it. In Y’all’s Line , the stage is open—and YOU are part of the show. events.title: Lululemon EARTHSTRONG Series
events.description: Stretch your body and calm your mind with yoga, meditation, breathwork, sound healing, and other practices in this series. Flow through poses under the sun, connect with nature, and soak in the vibrant energy of Atlanta while joining a community of like-minded individuals. events.title: 250 Years Of Humor For The 4th
events.description: From the very first jokes made along Boston Harbor during the tea party to the comedians watching UFC fights on the lawn of the White House, America has always tried to find the humor in the world. This weekend, let’s celebrate the most important of rights – our freedom of speech to laugh at some of the best comedians that call Atlanta home.

events.title: Marietta Square Art Walk
events.description: Shop, dine, and grab a drink for a stroll around the Square each First Friday of the month. Art Walk is a free self-guided walking tour that celebrates the vitality of Marietta’s diverse cultural Arts scene, showcasing local artists throughout Marietta Square.

events.title: Welcome to Atlanta Party
events.description: @ Reserve Your FREE Ticket Ticket Whether you’re a lifelong Atlanta resident or a first-time visitor, join us on Friday, July 3 , from 6:30pm-9:30pm for a sample of all things Atlanta! events.title: Independence Eve Concert
events.description: Marietta Parks, Recreation & Facilities announces that Atlanta’s own Drivin N Cryin will headline the City’s Independence Eve Concert on Friday, July 3, from 7:00 PM to 9:00 PM on the historic Marietta Square. events.title: Timba on the Shed
events.description: Enjoy an afternoon of non-stop Cuban music with a touch of bachata, perfect for dancing and connecting with friends. The fun starts at 5PM with a free salsa lesson, followed by music until around 8PM. Join us at Ponce City Market’s Shed, right by the BeltLine. This event happens every first Saturday of the month, so bring your friends and let’s dance!

events.title: Landon Talks
events.description: ALL VIP SEATS INCLUDE POST SHOW MEET and GREET. Iconic southern storyteller Landon Bryant, known as “Landon Talks” is coming to Atlanta to discuss everything from mules to vegetables while unpacking phrases like “take to the bed”, “I’d have to feel better to die,” and his personal story of going to school at Walmart High. Don’t miss this very special evening

events.title: Fairytale Friday
events.description: Come to the Garden dressed as a favorite fairytale character, fairies, dragons, knights, princesses, witches and wizards. Starting at 11 a.m. in the Children’s Garden, enjoy a fairytale parade filled with music and bubbles. This event is free with Garden admission. Schedule: April 10, May 8, June 12, and July 10, (the second Friday of the month April – July)

events.title: Friday Night Live Music at Church Street Park
events.description: From June through October, the Church Street development is bringing local singer-songwriters and jazz combos to Church Street Park for an evening of live music under the open sky, one Friday a month from 6-8 p.m. No tickets. No cover. Just good music and good company. Bring a blanket, bring a chair, bring an entire picnic dinner! This is a recurring series.

events.title: Marietta Square Art Walk
events.description: Shop, dine, and grab a drink for a stroll around the Square each First Friday of the month. Art Walk is a free self-guided walking tour that celebrates the vitality of Marietta’s diverse cultural Arts scene, showcasing local artists throughout Marietta Square.

events.title: Friday Night Live Music at Church Street Park
events.description: From June through October, the Church Street development is bringing local singer-songwriters and jazz combos to Church Street Park for an evening of live music under the open sky, one Friday a month from 6-8 p.m. No tickets. No cover. Just good music and good company. Bring a blanket, bring a chair, bring an entire picnic dinner! This is a recurring series.
